raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Tadeht tu ne ehdift wairß
Zilwekus/ nedß likfi tawus Laudis
peedausitees/ fakka tas
Kungs KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. Un es ne likßu wairß to
Paganeo Neewafchann pahr te-
wim dfirdeht/ un tu ne neffifi
wairß to Lauscho Apmehdifscha-
nu/ un ne likfi tawus Laudis
wairß peedansitees/ fakka tas
Kungs KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "16. Atfak notikfe ta KUNga
Wahrds us man/ un fazztja:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "17. Tu Zilweka Behrns/ tas
Israëta Nains/ kad tee fawá
Semmê dshwoja/ tad tee to fa-
gahnija ar fawa Zetta/ un ar fa-
weem Darbeem/ winnu Zetsch
bija wanná Breeklichá/ ki ta Ne-
fchihstiba weenas fahrnainas
Seewas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "18. Tadeht isgahsu es fawu
Bahrsibu prett winneem/ ta Af-
tins deht/ ko tee eckich Semmes
bij islehjuschi/ un winnu Suhdu-
Deewu deht/ ar ko tee to bij fa-
gahnijscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "19. Un es fskaifiju tohs starp
teein Paganeeni/ un tee tappe
isputtinati Walstis/ es fohdiju
tohs pehz winno Zetta/ un pehz
winnu Darbeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "20. Kad tee nu pee teein Pa-
ganeem nahze/ kurp tee bija gah-
juſchi/ tad fagahnija tee mannu
htu Wahrdu/ tapehz ka mo
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. Bet es faudseju ma-
twehta Wahrdã deht/, ko tee
fraëka Behrni fagahnija st-
teem Paganeem/ kurp tee
nahkuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "22. Tapehz fakki us Isra-
Namnu: Ta fakka tas Ku-
KUNGS: Es to ne darru ju-
deht/ tu Israëta Nams/
manna twehta Wahrdã deht-
juhs eſſat fagahniſcht starp t-
Paganeem/ kurp juhs eſſat
kuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "23. Jo es swehtischu ma-
leelu Wahrdũ/ kas starp t-
Paganeem irr fagahnihts/
juhs winno Widdũ eſſat fa-
nijtch. Un tee Pagant fa-
tihs/ ka es tas KUNGS ef-
takka tas Kungs KUNGS/
Es pee juhs preekich winnu
zim tapfchu fivehtihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "24. Jo es atweddischu
no teem Paganeem/ un tap-
naschu juhs no wiſſahm 2-
stim/ un weddischu juhs a-
juhtãs Semmês.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "25. Tad flazzinaschu ee-
jums fchkihstu Uhdeni/ ka
fchkihsti tohpat/ no wiſſahm
fu Netchkikhstibahm/ un no
feem juhfu Suhdu-Deer-
gribbu ce juhs fchkihstibt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "26. Un es dohtchu jums
nu jaunu Sirði/ un weenu
nu Garru juhfo Widdũ/ u-
jemschu to akminainn Sir
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
